description:
trainedby.ai - Your AI fitness coach, but with actual data

Connect your wearables (Garmin, Oura, Whoop, Apple Health, 50+ platforms) to ChatGPT or Claude. Your AI coach finally knows your real training load, sleep, and recovery—without you typing a word.

The Problem

People use ChatGPT for marathon training, strength programs, and fitness planning. It's knowledgeable and available 24/7.
